name: German Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sauce ingredients in a saucepan and simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Blanch a large head of cabbage in boiling water for 3 minutes.
3. Peel off 16 leaves from the blanched cabbage (you may need to dip in water again to get all leaves off).
4. Mix ground beef, rice, onion, parsley, and spices well in a bowl.
5. Pat down mixture into the prepared cabbage leaf.
6. Cut into 16 portions, like cutting pie.
7. Place meat mixture on one cabbage leaf and fold up.
8. If needed, cut a "V" at the core part of the cabbage leaf to make folding easier.
9. Place seam side down in the pan.
10. Repeat with all rolls.
11. Pour sauce over all the rolls.
12. Top with crushed ginger snap crumbs (12-14 cookies worth).
13. Bake covered at 350°F for 1 hour, then remove the cover and bake for another half hour.
